name: Iso11783IL_OPChangeFillAttribute
title: Iso11783IL_OPChangeFillAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPChangeFillAttribute( dword objectID, dword color, dword type, dword patternID );
description: The function changes the properties of a fill attribute object. A Change Fill Attribute command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Object ID of a fill attribute object
